Interface PassiveAbility

All Superinterfaces:
Ability
All Known Implementing Classes:
FishersFrenzy, LineMastery, MasterAngler, SteadyCurrent
public interface PassiveAbility extends Ability
Extension of Ability for passives that participate in the passive framework routing.

Implement this interface instead of plain Ability when a passive should be invoked automatically by AbstractSkill.firePassives(PassiveTrigger, Player, UUID) rather than being called ad-hoc from the skill's event handler.

A passive may react to more than one trigger type; accepts(PassiveTrigger) is checked before each dispatch so a single class can handle multiple trigger types with an instanceof switch inside onPassiveTrigger(Player, UUID, PassiveTrigger).

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    boolean
    accepts(PassiveTrigger trigger)
    Returns true if this passive should fire for the given trigger.
    void
    onPassiveTrigger(org.bukkit.entity.Player player, UUID uuid, PassiveTrigger trigger)
    Called by AbstractSkill.firePassives(PassiveTrigger, Player, UUID) when this passive's trigger fires and the player's level meets Ability.unlockLevel().
    String
    triggerCondition()
    Short player-facing description of when this passive fires, shown in the skill detail GUI.

    Methods inherited from interface Ability

    description, id, name, unlockLevel

  • Method Details

    • accepts

      boolean accepts(PassiveTrigger trigger)
      Returns true if this passive should fire for the given trigger.

      Typically implemented as one or more instanceof checks: 

          return trigger instanceof FishCastTrigger
        || trigger instanceof FishCatchTrigger;

      Parameters:
      trigger - the trigger token about to be dispatched
      Returns:
      true if this passive handles the trigger

    • onPassiveTrigger

      void onPassiveTrigger(org.bukkit.entity.Player player, UUID uuid, PassiveTrigger trigger)
      Called by AbstractSkill.firePassives(PassiveTrigger, Player, UUID) when this passive's trigger fires and the player's level meets Ability.unlockLevel().

      The trigger token may be cast to the concrete type declared by accepts(PassiveTrigger). Passives that aggregate outputs (e.g. timer reductions) write results back into the trigger; the skill reads those results after firePassives returns.

      Parameters:
      player - the player the trigger concerns
      uuid - the player's UUID
      trigger - the trigger token; cast to the expected concrete type

    • triggerCondition

      String triggerCondition()
      Short player-facing description of when this passive fires, shown in the skill detail GUI. Example: "On casting a fishing rod."
      Returns:
      a player-facing trigger description
